ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_3_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code of the country */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Geographical region the country belongs to */,
  "subregion" INTEGER /* Geographical subregion the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "gini_index" REAL /* Gini index to measure income inequality */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_subregion FOREIGN KEY ("subregion") REFERENCES subregions ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the metric data */,
  "overshoot_day" REAL /* Ecological Overshoot Day in Julian days */,
  "number_of_earths" REAL /* Number of Earths required to sustain the country's current consumption */,
  "carbon_emissions" REAL /* Total carbon emissions in metric tons */,
  "land_use" REAL /* Total land use in square kilometers */,
  "water_consumption" REAL /* Total water consumption in cubic meters */,
  "biodiversity_loss" REAL /* Percentage of biodiversity loss */,
  "forest_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of land covered by forests */,
  "renewable_energy_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of energy consumption from renewable sources */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  "water_pollution_index" REAL /* Water pollution index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metric data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subregions" (
  "subregion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subregion */,
  "subregion_name" TEXT /* Name of the subregion */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the subregion belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subregion */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the subregion data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subregion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES environmental_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source information was last updated */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last checked for updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_sources" (
  "metric_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric-source relationship */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental metric */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date when the metric-source relationship was last checked for updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_sources_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES environmental_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the category information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_category_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric-category relationship */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental metric */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metric-category relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_category_links_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES metric_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_category_links_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES environmental_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric file */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental metric the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the metric file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the metric file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON, TXT) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_files_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES environmental_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric readme file */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental metric the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the metric readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the metric readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, MD) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the readme file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_readme_files_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES environmental_metrics ("metric_id")
)
